run_script_content:
setenv VERDI_HOME /tools/synopsys/verdi/W-2024.09-SP2
setenv VCS_HOME /tools/synopsys/vcs/W-2024.09-SP1
setenv VERDI_ENABLE_ELECTRONIC_DEBUG_RECORD 
setenv VERDI_EDR_REPLAY_SESSION 
setenv GUI_REGRESSION_MODE 1 
setenv REGRESSION_MODE 1 
setenv VERDI_MULTITASKING_INTERACTIVE_MODE 0
setenv EDR_LINK_SOURCE_PATH /home/hedu20/YUN/0402_adder
/bin/cp -rs $EDR_LINK_SOURCE_PATH edr_restore_dir
cd edr_restore_dir
/bin/rm -rf verdiLog *rtdb* novas.* vdCovLog .certitudeGUI
/bin/rm -rf .edr_cp
/bin/rm -rf edr_checkpoint_*
/bin/rm -rf run_tcl_replay.csh run_save_session.csh run_post_process.csh upload.json 
/bin/cp -rf $EDR_LINK_SOURCE_PATH/novas.* .
$VERDI_HOME/bin/verdi -play ${EDR_WORKING_DIR}/../replay.tcl &
